raw_response:
```json
{
  "rephrased_requirement": "Design a secure, high-performance AI-powered file analysis and question answering system, where users can upload files, ask questions related to the content, and receive accurate responses within a specified time frame.",
  "functional_requirements": [
    "Users can upload files in various formats (e.g., PDF, DOCX, TXT, CSV, etc.)",
    "Users can ask questions related to the content of the uploaded files",
    "The system analyzes the uploaded files and provides relevant answers to the user's questions",
    "The system supports multiple file upload and question answering sessions concurrently",
    "The system provides a user-friendly interface for file upload, question input, and answer display"
  ],
  "non_functional_requirements": [
    "Response time: The system should provide answers within 5 seconds of the user submitting a question, with a latency of less than 1 second for 99.9% of requests",
    "Throughput: The system should be able to handle at least 100 concurrent file uploads and question answering sessions",
    "Accuracy: The system should provide accurate answers to at least 95% of user questions, with a confidence level of 0.8 or higher",
    "Uptime: The system should be available and accessible to users at least 99.99% of the time"
  ],
  "security_requirements": [
    "Data encryption: All uploaded files and user data should be encrypted at rest and in transit using industry-standard encryption protocols (e.g., TLS, AES)",
    "Access control: Only authorized users should be able to access and manage their uploaded files and question answering sessions",
    "Authentication: Users should be authenticated using a secure authentication mechanism (e.g., OAuth, OpenID Connect)",
    "Input validation: The system should validate user input to prevent SQL injection, cross-site scripting (XSS), and other types of attacks"
  ],
  "acceptance_criteria": [
    "The system provides accurate answers to at least 95% of user questions",
    "The system responds to user questions within 5 seconds",
    "The system can handle at least 100 concurrent file uploads and question answering sessions",
    "The system is available and accessible to users at least 99.99% of the time"
  ],
  "recommended_solution_approach": "A cloud-based microservices architecture using containerization (e.g., Docker) and orchestration (e.g., Kubernetes), with a combination of natural language processing (NLP) and machine learning (ML) technologies (e.g., TensorFlow, PyTorch) for file analysis and question answering. The system should also utilize a secure and scalable storage solution (e.g., Amazon S3, Google Cloud Storage) for uploaded files and user data.",
  "open_questions": [
    "What is the expected volume of user traffic and file uploads, and how will the system be scaled to handle increased demand?",
    "What are the specific file formats and types that the system needs to support, and are there any specific requirements for file analysis and question answering?",
    "How will the system be integrated with existing user authentication and authorization systems, and what are the requirements for access control and data encryption?"
  ]
}
```

parsed_output.rephrased_requirement: Design a secure, high-performance AI-powered file analysis and question answering system, where users can upload files, ask questions related to the content, and receive accurate responses within a specified time frame.
functional_requirements: Users can upload files in various formats (e.g., PDF, DOCX, TXT, CSV, etc.)
Users can ask questions related to the content of the uploaded files
The system analyzes the uploaded files and provides relevant answers to the user's questions
The system supports multiple file upload and question answering sessions concurrently
The system provides a user-friendly interface for file upload, question input, and answer display
non_functional_requirements: Response time: The system should provide answers within 5 seconds of the user submitting a question, with a latency of less than 1 second for 99.9% of requests
Throughput: The system should be able to handle at least 100 concurrent file uploads and question answering sessions
Accuracy: The system should provide accurate answers to at least 95% of user questions, with a confidence level of 0.8 or higher
Uptime: The system should be available and accessible to users at least 99.99% of the time
security_requirements: Data encryption: All uploaded files and user data should be encrypted at rest and in transit using industry-standard encryption protocols (e.g., TLS, AES)
Access control: Only authorized users should be able to access and manage their uploaded files and question answering sessions
Authentication: Users should be authenticated using a secure authentication mechanism (e.g., OAuth, OpenID Connect)
Input validation: The system should validate user input to prevent SQL injection, cross-site scripting (XSS), and other types of attacks
acceptance_criteria: The system provides accurate answers to at least 95% of user questions
The system responds to user questions within 5 seconds
The system can handle at least 100 concurrent file uploads and question answering sessions
The system is available and accessible to users at least 99.99% of the time
parsed_output.recommended_solution_approach: A cloud-based microservices architecture using containerization (e.g., Docker) and orchestration (e.g., Kubernetes), with a combination of natural language processing (NLP) and machine learning (ML) technologies (e.g., TensorFlow, PyTorch) for file analysis and question answering. The system should also utilize a secure and scalable storage solution (e.g., Amazon S3, Google Cloud Storage) for uploaded files and user data.
open_questions: What is the expected volume of user traffic and file uploads, and how will the system be scaled to handle increased demand?
What are the specific file formats and types that the system needs to support, and are there any specific requirements for file analysis and question answering?
How will the system be integrated with existing user authentication and authorization systems, and what are the requirements for access control and data encryption?
